title: Brat And It's The Same But There's Three More Songs So It's Not
notes:
Non-US worldwide release.

Made in Czech Republic.

Runouts are machine-engraved.

An additional 300 copies were retailed by Assai Records with a hand numbered Japanese style obi under their Assai Obi Editions range. It also came with a "BUMPIN' THAT" sticker.
